# addEdgeAndSave

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the addEdgeAndSave mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.addEdgeAndSave({ input: '<AddEdgeAndSaveInput>' }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run addEdgeAndSave

```typescript
const result = await db.mutation.addEdgeAndSave({ input: '<AddEdgeAndSaveInput>' }).execute();
```
